★彡 NEW: HELLFIRE MANGO SLUSHY OUT NOW 彡★ COMMIT 2 SINS, GET 1 FREE ★彡 LOTTERY DREAMS — PLAY TODAY, CHANGE TOMORROW 彡★ MILK OF THE DAMNED back in stock (we think) ★彡 OPEN 24/7 LIKE HELL 彡★ take the PREDICTABILITY QUIZ!! ★彡 NEW GAME: NIGHT SHIFT — can u survive till 6am?? ★彡
HOME | TODAY'S DEALS | THE QUIZ | GAMES NEW!! | GUESTBOOK | DIRECTIONS

welcome to the OFFICIAL 7-Hell web site!!

thats right, we're on the INFORMATION SUPERHIGHWAY now. corporate said every location needs a "web presence" so here it is. we sell gas, slushies, lottery tickets, hot dogs of unverifiable age, and everything else you could need at 3 in the morning. we are legally required to say the coffee is "hot". we are open ALL NIGHT, EVERY NIGHT. we have always been open. come on down!!

(site best viewed on Internet Explorer 6 at 800x600. if the page looks weird on Netscape thats a YOU problem)

🔥 TODAY'S DEALS 🔥 HOT!!

click any flyer to view BIG SIZE. printed flyers available in store (ask gary)

NEW!! show your 7-HELL pride!! beanies, hoodies + more. ask Gary (he probably has no idea where they are)
the LOITERER SPECIAL is back by popular demand (nobody asked) — 2 pepperoni sticks, taquito bits, instant ramen, 1 gatorade. $6.66. no substitutions, no receipts.
SCRATCH & WIN!!! millions could be urs. (they're not.) ask about our $1 tickets at the counter, if anyone's actually working
half gallon, 64oz. EXPIRATION DATE MAY VARY. by purchasing you accept the risks. —mgmt
NEW FLAVOR alert!!! hellfire mango, so hot it hurts (for real, we had 2 complaints)
3:17 AM special. cold pizza + toxic coffee, $2.99. we don't judge (we've seen worse). always available, we're never closed
hot AND cold at the same time. science we don't understand either
commit two sins get 1 FREE!!! (hot dog + hot dog + slushy, $5.99) limit 1 per customer. we're watching.

✨ how PREDICTABLE are you?? ✨

do you follow patterns? take our quiz and find out!! 10 questions. be honest, nobody's checking. (nobody's checking.)

1. what's your go-to grab at 7-Hell?
2. it's 2 AM and you can't sleep. where do you end up?
3. describe your typical tuesday.
4. the slushie machine's broken again. you:
5. how do people usually describe you?
6. you clock someone doing the exact same thing, same time, three days running. you:
7. your route home — same every night, or different?
8. if you disappeared tomorrow, how long before someone noticed the pattern was broken?
9. what's something about you nobody could predict?
10. do you believe people can actually change?
enter ur name for your results!! (optional)

🎮 GAMES 🎮 NEW!!

somebody installed a game on the breakroom computer. corporate said remove it. we have decided to interpret that as "share it with the whole internet."

NIGHT SHIFT BETA!!
a 7-HELL work simulator. you have the register from 2AM to 6AM.
build the orders. vent the machine. do not let the vibe die.
(BETA — still being built. report weirdness to the counter.)
